put.summary: Saves or updates maritime emissions monitoring plan data

400.description:
Bad Request	
	
 Error Code | Description 	
FORM1001 | Form validation failed 	
FORM1002 | Parameters validation failed 	
EMP1001 | Business validation error

put.summary: Saves or updates maritime annual emissions report data. This endpoint will be available from 1 July 2026 in production environment

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: The year of the annual emissions report. Accepts the current year and possibly previous years with AER (based on the first year of maritime activity of the account)

400.description:
Bad Request	
	
 Error Code | Description 	
FORM1001 | Form validation failed 	
FORM1002 | Parameters validation failed 	
AER1004 | Business validation error

404.description:
Not Found	
	
 Error Code | Description 	
AER1007 | AER does not exist for specific year

tags: Maritime annual emissions report verification API
put.summary: Saves or updates maritime annual emissions report verification data. This endpoint will be available from 1 July 2026 in production environment

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: The year of the annual emissions report being verified. Accepts the current year and possibly previous years with AER (based on the first year of maritime activity of the account

400.description:
Bad Request	
	
 Error Code | Description 	
FORM1001 | Form validation failed 	
FORM1002 | Parameters validation failed 	
AER1005 | Business validation error

404.description:
Not Found	
	
 Error Code | Description 	
AER1007 | AER does not exist for specific year

outsourcedActivitiesExists.description: If true, the related procedure data are required, otherwise must be omitted

delegatedResponsibilityUsed.description: Delegation of UK ETS compliance by registered ship owners. If true, registeredOwners and responsibilityDeclaration are required otherwise they must be omitted

responsibilityDeclaration.description: Maritime Operator declares that the information provided is true. If delegatedResponsibilityUsed is true it must be true, otherwise it must be omitted

type.description: Decision reason type that the report cannot be verified

details.description: Decision reason details. Must be provided if type is 'VERIFICATION_DATA_OR_INFORMATION_LIMITATIONS', 'SCOPE_LIMITATIONS_DUE_TO_LACK_OF_CLARITY', 'SCOPE_LIMITATIONS_OF_APPROVED_MONITORING_PLAN', 'NOT_APPROVED_MONITORING_PLAN_BY_REGULATOR' or 'ANOTHER_REASON'

ExternalAerNotVerifiedDecisionReason.description: List the reasons for your decision. Provide only when type is 'NOT_VERIFIED'

tco2Total.description: Carbon dioxide. Positive or zero decimal number with fraction part max 7 digits

tch4eqTotal.description: Methane. Positive or zero decimal number with fraction part max 7 digits

tn2oeqTotal.description: Nitrous oxide. Positive or zero decimal number with fraction part max 7 digits

explanation.description: Give as much detail as possible, including: the nature and size of the non-compliance and which element of the non-compliance it relates to

ExternalVerifierComment.description: Recommended improvements. Required only when 'exist' is true, otherwise must be omitted

ExternalEmpEmissionsProcedures.description: Procedures related to emissions sources and emissions factors

name.description: Name of the Ship as stated on IMO GISIS

companyNature.description: Nature of the company for the ship referenced in this EMP

methodRequired.description: Indicates if a data gap method required during the reporting year

methodApproved.description: Indicates if the data gap method already been approved by the regulator. Required only when 'methodRequired' is true, otherwise must be omitted

methodConservative.description: Indicates if the method used was conservative. Required only when 'methodApproved' is false, otherwise must be omitted

noConservativeMethodDetails.description: Non conservative method details. Required only when 'methodConservative' is false, otherwise must be omitted

materialMisstatementExist.description: Indicates if method lead to a material misstatement. Required only when 'methodApproved' is false, otherwise must be omitted

materialMisstatementDetails.description: Material misstatement details. Required only when 'materialMisstatementExist' is true, otherwise must be omitted

exist.description: Indicates if there are any recommended improvements

recommendedImprovements.description: Recommended improvements. Required only when 'exist' is true, otherwise must be omitted

captureAndStorageApplied.description: Are carbon capture and storage technologies being applied. If true, technology and emissionSourceName are required

technology.description: Technology that is used for carbon capture and storage

emissionSourceName.description: Emission source names this technology is applied to

items.description: Emission source names this technology is applied to

ExternalEmpCarbonCapture.description: Application of carbon capture and storage technologies

otherFuelType.description: Description of the fuel type if not listed (fuelTypeCode OTHER)

ttwEFCarbonDioxide.description: Tank to wake emission factor for carbonDioxide. Positive or zero decimal number with integer part max 12 digits

ttwEFMethane.description: Tank to wake emission factor for methane. Positive or zero decimal number with integer part max 12 digits

ttwEFNitrousOxide.description: Tank to wake emission factor for nitrousOxide. Positive or zero decimal number with integer part max 12 digits

uncertaintyLevel.description: Level of uncertainty associated with the fuel monitoring methods

ExternalEmpFuelConsumptionProcedures.description: Procedures related to the monitoring of greenhouse gas emissions and fuel consumption

otherFuelType.description: Description of the fuel type if not listed (fuelTypeCode OTHER)

amount.description: Fuel consumption amount. Positive or zero decimal number with fraction part max 5 digits

otherFuelType.description: Description of the fuel type if not listed (fuelTypeCode OTHER)

fuelMass.description: Fuel mass. Positive decimal number with fraction part max 5 digits

ttwEFCarbonDioxide.description: Tank to wake emission factor for carbonDioxide. Positive or zero decimal number with integer part max 12 digits

uncertaintyLevel.description: Level of uncertainty associated with the fuel monitoring methods

measuringEquipment.description: Description of the measurement instruments involved

agreementDate.description: Date of written agreement (past or present)

smfBatchClaimsReviewed.description: Indicates if maritime operator's eligible fuel batch claims has been reviewed

batchReferencesNotReviewed.description: List the batch references that were not reviewed. Required only when 'smfBatchClaimsReviewed' is false, otherwise must be omitted

dataSampling.description: Describes how data sampling was carried out and what documents were reviewed. Required only when 'smfBatchClaimsReviewed' is false, otherwise must be omitted

reviewResults.description: Describes the results of your review. State if: the emissions reduction claim is supported by sufficient and appropriate internal and external evidence and the amount of reductions from the use of eligible fuel is fair and accurate

noDoubleCountingConfirmation.description: Describes the steps taken to confirm none of the eligible fuel included in the emissions reduction claim relating to the scheme year had been sold or used elsewhere by the maritime operator to claim an emission reduction, or financial benefit, in any other mandatory or voluntary scheme

evidenceAllCriteriaMetExist.description: Indicates if all of the batch claims reviewed contain evidence that shows the eligibility criteria were met

noCriteriaMetIssues.description: Identified issues. Required only when 'evidenceAllCriteriaMetExist' is false, otherwise must be omitted

complianceWithEmpRequirementsExist.description: Indicates if the maritime operator’s emissions reduction claim is compliant with their emissions monitoring plan, the legislation and regulator guidance

notCompliedWithEmpRequirementsAspects.description: Not complied aspects. Required only when 'complianceWithEmpRequirementsExist' is false, otherwise must be omitted

reductionClaimApplied.description: If true, the reduction claim data are required, otherwise must be omitted

comments.description: List the comments for your decision. Provide only when type is 'VERIFIED_AS_SATISFACTORY_WITH_COMMENTS'

items.description: List the comments for your decision. Provide only when type is 'VERIFIED_AS_SATISFACTORY_WITH_COMMENTS'

notVerifiedReasons.description: List the reasons for your decision. Provide only when type is 'NOT_VERIFIED'

otherFuelType.description: Description of the fuel type if not listed (fuelTypeCode OTHER)

ttwEFCarbonDioxide.description: Tank to wake emission factor for carbonDioxide. Positive or zero decimal number with integer part max 12 digits

ttwEFMethane.description: Tank to wake emission factor for methane. Positive or zero decimal number with integer part max 12 digits

ttwEFNitrousOxide.description: Tank to wake emission factor for nitrousOxide. Positive or zero decimal number with integer part max 12 digits

emissionSourceName.description: Emission source names this device is used for

items.description: Emission source names this device is used for

ExternalEmpMeasurementDescription.description: Description of the measurement instruments involved

exist.description: Indicates if there have been any uncorrected non-conformities with the approved emissions monitoring plan

uncorrectedNonConformities.description: Non-conformities with the approved emissions monitoring plan. Required only when 'exist' is true, otherwise must be omitted

existPriorYearIssues.description: Indicates if there are any non-conformities from the previous year that have not been resolved

priorYearIssues.description: Non-conformities from the previous year that have not been resolved. Required only when 'existPriorYearIssues' is true, otherwise must be omitted

ExternalAerVerification.description: The annual emissions report verification data

derogationCodeUsed.description: Derogation for monitoring the amount of fuel consumed used. If true, minimumNumberOfVoyages is required

ExternalEmpExemptionConditions.description: Conditions of exemption from per voyage reporting

exist.description: Indicates if there have been any non-compliances with the maritime monitoring and reporting requirements in the UK ETS Order

uncorrectedNonCompliances.description: Non-compliances with the maritime monitoring and reporting requirements. Required only when 'exist' is true, otherwise must be omitted

slipPercentage.description: Emission factor of slipped fuel. Decimal number between 0.0000 and 1 (inclusive) with up to 1 integer digits and 4 fractional digits

name.description: Name of the Ship as stated on IMO GISIS

companyNature.description: Nature of the company for the ship referenced in this EMP

allYear.description: Indicates if the reporting period of the ship covers the entire year

from.description: Start date of the period. Required only when 'allYear' is false, otherwise must be omitted

to.description: End date of the period. Required only when 'allYear' is false, otherwise must be omitted

emissionsCorrect.description: Indicates if the reporting and surrender obligation emissions are correct

manuallyProvidedTotalEmissions.description: Total verified maritime emissions for the scheme year. Required only when 'emissionsCorrect' is false, otherwise must be omitted

manuallyProvidedSurrenderEmissions.description: Emissions figure for surrender for the scheme year. Required only when 'emissionsCorrect' is false, otherwise must be omitted

manuallyProvidedLessVoyagesInNorthernIre.description: Less Northern Ireland surrender deduction. Required only when 'emissionsCorrect' is false, otherwise must be omitted

additionalChangesNotCovered.description: Indicates if there are any changes to the emissions monitoring plan during the scheme year

additionalChangesNotCoveredDetails.description: List the agreed changes, including the date and type of communication. Required only when 'additionalChangesNotCovered' is true, otherwise must be omitted

exist.description: Indicates if there are any misstatements that were not corrected before issuing this report

uncorrectedMisstatements.description: Misstatements not corrected before issuing this report. Required only when 'exist' is true, otherwise must be omitted

explanation.description: Give as much detail as possible, including: the nature and size of the non-compliance and which element of the non-compliance it relates to

materialEffect.description: Indicates if there is a material effect on the total emissions reported

ExternalUncorrectedItem.description: Non-compliances with the maritime monitoring and reporting requirements. Required only when 'exist' is true, otherwise must be omitted

accuracyCompliant.description: Indicates the accuracy of the report

accuracyNonCompliantReason.description: Reason report was not accurate. Required only when 'accuracyCompliant' is false, otherwise must be omitted

completenessCompliant.description: Indicates the completeness of the report

completenessNonCompliantReason.description: Reason report was not complete. Required only when 'completenessCompliant' is false, otherwise must be omitted

consistencyNonCompliantReason.description: Reason report was not consistent. Required only when 'consistencyCompliant' is false, otherwise must be omitted

comparabilityNonCompliantReason.description: Reason report was not comparable. Required only when 'comparabilityCompliant' is false, otherwise must be omitted

transparencyNonCompliantReason.description: Reason report was not transparent. Required only when 'transparencyCompliant' is false, otherwise must be omitted

integrityNonCompliantReason.description: Reason report lacked integrity. Required only when 'integrityCompliant' is false, otherwise must be omitted

ExternalAerComplianceMonitoringReporting.description: Compliance with monitoring and reporting principles

numberOfDays.description: Number of days the team was on site

ExternalAerInPersonSiteVisitDatesDetails.description: In person site visits details. Provide only when visit type is 'IN_PERSON'

accreditationReferenceDocumentTypes.description: Reference documents that are appropriate to the accreditation you hold

items.description: Reference documents that are appropriate to the accreditation you hold

otherReference.description: Reference details. Required only when 'accreditationReferenceDocumentTypes' contains 'OTHER', otherwise must be omitted

ExternalAerInformationOfOpinionRelevance.description: Further information of relevance to the opinion

defaultFactorsUsed.description: If false, the related procedure data are required, otherwise must be omitted

monitoringPlanRequirementsMet.description: Indicates if the emissions monitoring plan requirements and conditions been met

monitoringPlanRequirementsNotMetReason.description: Reason monitoring plan requirements were not met. Required only when 'monitoringPlanRequirementsMet' is false, otherwise must be omitted

etsOrderRequirementsMet.description: Indicates if the requirements of the UK ETS Order been met

etsOrderRequirementsNotMetReason.description: Reason UK ETS Order requirements were not met. Required only when 'etsOrderRequirementsMet' is false, otherwise must be omitted

detailSourceDataVerified.description: Indicates if the detail and source of data have be verified

detailSourceDataNotVerifiedReason.description: Reason detail and source of data have not be verified. Required only when 'detailSourceDataVerified' is false, otherwise must be omitted

partOfSiteVerification.description: Part of site verification justification. Required only when 'detailSourceDataVerified' is true, otherwise must be omitted

controlActivitiesDocumented.description: Indicates if control activities documented, implemented, maintained and effective to reduce any risks

controlActivitiesNotDocumentedReason.description: Reason control activities were not documented, implemented, maintained and effective to reduce any risks. Required only when 'controlActivitiesDocumented' is false, otherwise must be omitted

proceduresMonitoringPlanDocumented.description: Indicates if procedures in the emissions monitoring plan documented, implemented, maintained and effective to reduce any risks

proceduresMonitoringPlanNotDocumentedRea.description: Reason procedures in the emissions monitoring plan were not documented, implemented, maintained and effective to reduce any risks. Required only when 'proceduresMonitoringPlanDocumented' is false, otherwise must be omitted

dataVerificationCompleted.description: Indicates if data verification has been completed as required

dataVerificationNotCompletedReason.description: Reason data verification was not completed as required. Required only when 'dataVerificationCompleted' is false, otherwise must be omitted

monitoringApproachAppliedCorrectly.description: Indicates if the monitoring approaches been applied correctly

monitoringApproachNotAppliedCorrectlyRea.description: Reason monitoring approaches have not been applied correctly. Required only when 'monitoringApproachAppliedCorrectly' is false, otherwise must be omitted

methodsApplyingMissingDataUsed.description: Indicates if methods used for applying missing data were appropriate

methodsApplyingMissingDataNotUsedReason.description: Reason methods used for applying missing data were not appropriate. Required only when 'methodsApplyingMissingDataUsed' is false, otherwise must be omitted

competentAuthorityGuidanceMet.description: Indicates if the regulator guidance has been met

competentAuthorityGuidanceNotMetReason.description: Reason regulator guidance has not been met. Required only when 'competentAuthorityGuidanceMet' is false, otherwise must be omitted

nonConformities.description: Indicates if non-conformities from last year been corrected

nonConformitiesDetails.description: Reason non-conformities from last year have not been corrected. Required only when 'nonConformities' is 'NO', otherwise must be omitted

shipSpecificUncertainty.description: Specific value for the level of uncertainty. Decimal number between 0 and 100 (inclusive) with up to 3 integer digits and 2 fractional digits

ExternalEmpUncertaintyLevel.description: Level of uncertainty associated with the fuel monitoring methods

emissionsReductionClaimExists.description: If true, the related procedure data are required, otherwise must be omitted

siteVisitDetails.description: In person site visits details. Provide only when visit type is 'IN_PERSON'

teamMembers.description: The names of the lead auditors and any technical experts involved. Separate the names with a comma, for example John Smith, Jane Smith. Provide only when visit type is 'IN_PERSON'

inPersonVisitReason.description: Reasons for making a virtual visit. Provide only when visit type is 'VIRTUAL'
